title: Add min_categories parameter to CategoricalNB
description:
sklearn CategoricalNB has min_categories: int | array-like = None. Sets a floor on the number of categories per feature (in case the training data does not include all possible categories).

ferrolearn CategoricalNB infers categories purely from observed values in fit(). Add with_min_categories(impl Into<Option<Vec<usize>>>) builder accepting either a scalar (broadcast to all features) or per-feature array. When set, allocate count tables sized max(observed_unique, min_categories[j]).

This is required to handle categories at predict time that were not present at fit time.
